General.Name: Aeso Holding Ltd
General.Description: Aeso Holding Limited, an investment holding company, provides fitting-out and renovation services in Hong Kong. The company undertakes fitting-out works for the construction of newly built commercial premises and residential developments; and renovation works, including alteration and addition works for existing commercial premises. It serves property developers, landlords, government authority, and international and local retail brands. Aeso Holding Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
